free_text: The total absorption of photons by nuclei.
Annihilation in flight of fast positrons.
The data averaging over available informatioN.
The  total  absorption cross sections for real photons
by nuclei from deuteron to uranium are discussed. The
absorption of photons by nuclei is compared with that
of  free  proton.  Integrated  cross   sections   are
discussed  on the basis of dispersion relations.  The
data for cross sections per nucleon are given.
The  data  have  been  received   from
J.Ahrens in form of digital data files.
Dates are   corrected   from   two  to  four  digits
including that in reference and  history,  new  data
for cross  sections in units mb are added in subents
